## Validation

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `ruff format --check .` passes
- [ ] Public behavior is documented
- [ ] Benchmark claims identify hardware, model revision, commands, cold/warm state, and raw results
- [ ] Store-format changes include a compatibility or migration decision

## Memory-boundary impact

Describe the largest tensor/chunk materialized by this change and any cache-accounting changes.
